title: CRISPR (CRSP) to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
text: CRISPR Q1 Earnings Summary. Expected Revenue: The consensus estimate for Q1 2024 total revenues stands at $8.31 million, primarily driven by collaboration revenues from its partner Vertex Pharmaceuticals. Main Focus: Investors are anticipated to concentrate on the initial sales numbers of CRISPR Therapeutics AG's newly approved gene therapy, Casgevy (exa-cel). Product Status: FDA approved Casgevy in December 2023 for sickle cell disease in patients 12 and older. Label expanded in early 2024 to include transfusion-dependent beta thalassemia. European Commission approved it in February 2024. Pipeline Updates: Management is expected to discuss progress on CAR-T therapy candidates (CTX112, CTX131) and in-vivo candidates (CTX310, CTX320) in development. Stock Performance: CRSP shares declined 10.8% year-to-date, underperforming the industry's 5.7% decline. Earnings Prediction: The analysis indicates no conclusive earnings beat is expected, with an Earnings ESP of 0.00% and expected loss of $1.63 per share.
